name: Forward change validation - {{ .applicationId }} - {{ .environmentId }}
description: Correlates Dynatrace service objectives with sanitized Forward change-validation evidence.

objectives.name: Forward validation evidence
objectives.description: Fails closed unless the selected Forward scope has one passing change-validation event in the validation window.
objectives.dqlQuery:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT"
| filter event.provider == "forward-dynatrace"
| filter event.type == "forward.dynatrace.change.validation"
| filter forward.dynatrace.scope_mapping_id == $ScopeMappingId
| summarize totalEvidence = count(), passingEvidence = countIf(forward.dynatrace.gate_decision == "pass")
| fieldsAdd validEvidence = if(totalEvidence == 1 and passingEvidence == 1, 1, else: 0)
| fields validEvidence

objectives.name: Service telemetry present
objectives.description: Fails closed when no root service request spans exist for the selected service and evidence window.
objectives.dqlQuery:
fetch spans
| filter dt.smartscape.service == $ServiceEntityId
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| summarize requests = count()

objectives.name: Request availability
objectives.description: Percentage of root service request spans that Dynatrace did not classify as failed.
objectives.dqlQuery:
fetch spans
| filter dt.smartscape.service == $ServiceEntityId
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| summarize total = count(), good = countIf(request.is_failed != true)
| fieldsAdd successRate = 100.0 * good / total
| fields successRate

objectives.name: Request performance
objectives.description: Percentage of root service request spans completed within the reviewed 500 millisecond pilot threshold.
objectives.dqlQuery:
fetch spans
| filter dt.smartscape.service == $ServiceEntityId
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| summarize total = count(), good = countIf(duration <= 500ms)
| fieldsAdd performanceRate = 100.0 * good / total
| fields performanceRate

objectives.name: Request volume
objectives.description: Informational capacity baseline for the selected service and evidence window.
objectives.dqlQuery:
fetch spans
| filter dt.smartscape.service == $ServiceEntityId
| filter request.is_root_span == true
| summarize requestCount = count()

objectives.name: Error log count
objectives.description: Informational starter objective; enable reviewed thresholds only after the tenant owner confirms service-to-log correlation.
objectives.dqlQuery:
fetch logs
| filter dt.entity.service == $ServiceEntityId
| summarize errorCount = countIf(loglevel == "ERROR")
